senses.def: SuBAdfzwam — paryāya: puRyam, SreyaH, sukftam, vfzaH

example.quote: eka eva suhfdDarmmo niDane'pyanuyAti yaH . SarIreRa samaM nASaM sarvvamanyattu gacCati ..

senses.loss: In the source this synonym run and its authority (iti Amara) are one indivisible iti-unit: sense enumeration and source attestation are a single construction, split into def + bibl here.

senses.def: nyAyaH; svaBAvaH; AcAraH; upamA; kratuH; ahiMsA; upanizat

example.quote: kftvA pravargyaM DarmmAKyaM yaTAvat dvijasattamAH . cakruste viDivadrAjaMstaTEvABizavaM dbijAH ..
prARAyAmastaTA DyAnaM pratyAhAro'Ta DAraRA . smaraRaYcEva yoge'smin paYca DarmmAH prakIrttitAH ..

loss: Source-parsed indigenous kosa entry: meanings/synonyms are grouped by their closing authority (iti <author>), the kosa's own sense-and-citation unit.
